title: taraxacum diversifolium
intro: Taraxacum diversifolium, also known as the variable dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is characterized by its diverse leaf shapes and sizes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum diversifolium include its ability to support liver health, reduce blood sugar levels, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
